architect.name: Architect
architect.summary: Designs strategy, structure, and long-range plans.
details: Best when turning complexity into clear systems.
Thrives with planning blocks and milestone tracking.

builder.name: Builder
builder.summary: Turns ideas into shipped outcomes quickly.
details: Keeps momentum high through action and delivery.
Needs prioritization guardrails to avoid overloading.

operator.name: Operator
operator.summary: Builds dependable process and execution consistency.
details: Optimizes for reliable delivery and quality control.
Excels with SOPs, routines, and measurable workflows.

connector.name: Connector
connector.summary: Builds trust, community, and relationship momentum.
details: Creates opportunities through authentic relationships.
Needs boundaries to keep energy and focus sustainable.

resource_generator.name: Resource Generator
resource_generator.summary: Finds leverage, revenue, and growth opportunities.
details: Spots monetization paths and practical upside.
Performs best when focused on highest-return bets.

educator.name: Educator
educator.summary: Converts complexity into clarity and confidence.
details: Leads through teaching, framing, and practical guidance.
Strongest with concise lessons and clear next actions.

protector.name: Protector
protector.summary: Safeguards quality, trust, and risk controls.
details: Balances growth with safety, standards, and resilience.
Thrives when risk checks are lightweight but consistent.

steward.name: Steward
steward.summary: Protects long-term trust through care and consistency.
details: Centers service quality, reliability, and retention.
Needs boundaries to avoid over-giving and burnout.

nurturer.name: Nurturer
nurturer.summary: Creates belonging, emotional safety, and loyalty.
details: Strengthens loyalty through empathy and responsiveness.
Best with explicit boundaries and scalable care patterns.

value_seeker.name: Value Seeker
details: Wants measurable outcomes.
Responds to clear comparisons and proof.

loyal_supporter.name: Loyal Supporter
loyal_supporter.summary: Stays with brands that earn trust.
details: Buys from trusted relationships.
Values reliability and care over novelty.

convenience_buyer.name: Convenience Buyer
details: Prefers speed and low cognitive load.
Responds to straightforward offers.

experience_seeker.name: Experience Seeker
experience_seeker.summary: Buys for quality feel and memorable outcomes.
details: Values premium experience and emotional resonance.
Influenced by sensory and story-driven cues.

social_promoter.name: Social Promoter
details: Driven by social identity and belonging.
Responds to community proof and shareability.

intentional_buyer.name: Intentional Buyer
details: Looks for fit, meaning, and trust.
Prefers thoughtful messaging over urgency pressure.

trend_explorer.name: Trend Explorer
trend_explorer.summary: Seeks new, novel, and emerging options.
details: Adopts early and enjoys discovery.
Responds to fresh positioning and innovation.
